{{Quote|Convey my dissatisfaction with Commander Stavan on his performance. Inform him that he has been removed from command and will be reassigned. That is all.|Galak Fyyar's transmission to the Kejim outpost|audio=Galaktransmission.flac|<ref name="JO" />}}
'''Stavan''' was an [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Galak Fyyar]] of the [[Empire Reborn]], a faction of the [[Imperial Remnant]]. Holding a [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Commander/Legends|commander]], he was stationed in an [[Kejim Outpost|outpost]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kejim]]<ref name="JO" /> around [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. During that [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="date">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' places the events in-game 8 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which takes place in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Therefore, the game takes place in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].</ref> around the [[Time/Legends|time]] a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] named [[Kyle Katarn]] was [[Mission to Kejim|investigating]] the outpost, Admiral Fyyar made a transmission to the outpost, in which he expressed disappointment with Stavan's performance and instructed that Stavan be removed from command and reassigned.<ref name="JO" />

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast}}
During his time investigating the Kejim outpost, Katarn stumbled upon the transmission involving Stavan and several other messages while examining a communications console.<ref name="JO" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Stavan was mentioned in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'', in which he did not appear but was mentioned in a transmission. While the communications console containing the message could be accessed by Kyle Katarn—the player character—finding the console was optional and did not affect the outcome of the game. However, this article was written with the assumption of 100 percent game completion.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1stm}}
